prompt:
User request:
Show a box plot of sales by product

Available columns:
product: category
profit: float
sales: float
month: category
segment: category
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.header("Sales by Product")

fig = px.box(
    df,
    x="product",
    y="sales",
    template="plotly_white"
)

fig.update_layout(height=500)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=True)

prompt:
User request:
Create a histogram of revenue where region == North with a Streamlit selectbox for region

Available columns:
date: datetime
region: category
revenue: float
year: int
units: int
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.header("Distribution of Revenue")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["region"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_region = st.selectbox("Region", options)

if selected_region == "All":
    df_filtered = df
else:
    df_filtered = df[df["region"] == selected_region]

plot_fig = px.histogram(
    df_filtered,
    x="revenue"
)

plot_fig.update_layout(height=500)

st.plotly_chart(plot_fig, use_container_width=False)

prompt:

import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

df_filtered = df[df["customer_age"] > 100]

df_plot = df_filtered.groupby("segment", as_index=False)["customer_age"].min()

fig = px.bar(
    df_plot,
    x="segment",
    y="customer_age"
)

fig.update_layout(height=500)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=True)

)

prompt:
User request:
Build a bar chart of count profit by month where year == 2022 with a Streamlit selectbox for region

Dataframe columns:
year: int
region: category
profit: float
revenue: float
month: category
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.subheader("Count Profit by Month")

df_filtered = df[df["year"] == 2022]

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["region"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_region = st.selectbox("Region", options)
if selected_region == "All":
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered
else:
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered[df_filtered["region"] == selected_region]

df_plot = df_filtered_widget.groupby("month", as_index=False)["profit"].count()

fig = px.bar(
    df_plot,
    x="month",
    y="profit",
    template="plotly_white",
    category_orders={"month": sorted(df_filtered_widget["month"].dropna().unique().tolist())}
)

fig.update_layout(height=500)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=True)

import plotly.express as px

st.title("Sum Customer Age over Date")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["segment"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_segment = st.selectbox("Segment", options)
if selected_segment == "All":
    df_widget = df
else:
    df_widget = df[df["segment"] == selected_segment]

df_plot = df_widget.groupby(["date", "product"], as_index=False)["customer_age"].sum()

plot_fig = px.line(
    df_plot,
    x="date",
    y="customer_age",
    color="product",
    template="simple_white"
)

plot_fig.update_layout(height=500)

st.plotly_chart(plot_fig, use_container_width=True)

prompt:
User request:
Create a heatmap of count by segment and product where units > 100 with a Streamlit selectbox for product

Available columns:
units: int
revenue: float
sales: float
product: category
segment: category
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.title("Count of Segment vs Product")

df_filtered = df[df["units"] > 100]

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["product"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_product = st.selectbox("Product", options)
if selected_product == "All":
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered
else:
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered[df_filtered["product"] == selected_product]

df_plot = df_filtered_widget.groupby(["segment", "product"]).size().reset_index(name="count")

pivot_table = df_plot.pivot(index="product", columns="segment", values="count").fillna(0)

fig = px.imshow(
    pivot_table,
    labels=dict(x="Segment", y="Product", color="Count"),
    x=pivot_table.columns,
    y=pivot_table.index,
    color_continuous_scale="Blues",
    template="simple_white"
)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=True)

Columns in df:
sales: float
customer_age: int
revenue: float
month: category
region: category
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.title("Mean Revenue over Month")

df_filtered = df[df["sales"] > 10]

options = ["All"] + sorted(df_filtered["region"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_region = st.selectbox("Region", options)
if selected_region == "All":
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered
else:
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered[df_filtered["region"] == selected_region]

df_plot = df_filtered_widget.groupby("month", as_index=False, observed=True)["revenue"].mean()

chart = px.line(
    df_plot,
    x="month",
    y="revenue",
    template="simple_white"
)

st.plotly_chart(chart, use_container_width=True)

options = ["All"] + sorted(df_filtered["segment"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_segment = st.selectbox("Segment", options)

if selected_segment == "All":
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered
else:
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered[df_filtered["segment"] == selected_segment]

        y="profit",
        template="simple_white"
    )
    
    plot_fig.update_layout(height=500)

else:
    st.warning("No data available for the selected segment.")

Dataframe columns:
region: category
month: category
product: category
profit: float
sales: float
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.header("Sum Sales over Month")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["region"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_region = st.selectbox("Region", options, index=options.index("North") if "North" in options else 0)

if selected_region == "All":
    df_filtered = df
else:
    df_filtered = df[df["region"] == selected_region]

df_plot = df_filtered.groupby("month", as_index=False)["sales"].sum()

chart = px.line(
    df_plot,
    x="month",
    y="sales",
    template="plotly"
)

st.plotly_chart(chart, use_container_width=False)

prompt:
User request:
Plot a heatmap of count by segment and region with a Streamlit selectbox for segment

Available columns:
segment: category
year: int
region: category
sales: float
date: datetime
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.title("Count of Segment vs Region")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["segment"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_segment = st.selectbox("Segment", options)
if selected_segment == "All":
    df_widget = df
else:
    df_widget = df[df["segment"] == selected_segment]

df_plot = df_widget.groupby(["segment", "region"]).size().reset_index(name="count")

chart = px.density_heatmap(
    df_plot,
    x="segment",
    y="region",
    z="count",
    histfunc="sum",
    template="simple_white"
)

st.plotly_chart(chart, use_container_width=True)

import plotly.express as px

)

output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.title("Count of Product vs Region")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["region"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_region = st.selectbox("Region", options)
if selected_region == "All":
    df_widget = df
else:
    df_widget = df[df["region"] == selected_region]

df_plot = df_widget.groupby(["product", "region"]).size().reset_index(name="count")

fig = px.density_heatmap(
    df_plot,
    x="product",
    y="region",
    z="count",
    histfunc="sum"
)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=True)

)

prompt:
User request:
Show a heatmap of count by region and segment where sales > 50 with a Streamlit selectbox for segment

Dataframe columns:
region: category
sales: float
units: int
revenue: float
segment: category
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.header("Count of Region vs Segment")

df_filtered = df[df["sales"] > 50]

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["segment"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_segment = st.selectbox("Segment", options)
if selected_segment == "All":
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered
else:
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered[df_filtered["segment"] == selected_segment]

df_plot = df_filtered_widget.groupby(["region", "segment"]).size().reset_index(name="count")

chart = px.density_heatmap(
    df_filtered_widget,
    x="region",
    y="segment",
    z="count",
    histfunc="count",
    template="plotly_white"
)

st.plotly_chart(chart, use_container_width=True)

Build a heatmap of count by region and segment with a Streamlit selectbox for segment

Dataframe columns:
year: int
date: datetime
segment: category
sales: float
region: category
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.subheader("Count of Region vs Segment")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["segment"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_segment = st.selectbox("Segment", options)
if selected_segment == "All":
    df_widget = df
else:
    df_widget = df[df["segment"] == selected_segment]

df_plot = df_widget.groupby(["region", "segment"]).size().reset_index(name="count")

fig = px.density_heatmap(
    df_plot,
    x="region",
    y="segment",
    z="count",
    histfunc="sum",
    template="plotly_white"
)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=True)

prompt:
User request:
Build a heatmap of count by region and segment

Dataframe columns:
customer_age: int
month: category
segment: category
units: int
region: category
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.subheader("Count of Region vs Segment")

df_plot = df.groupby(["region", "segment"], as_index=False).size().rename(columns={"size": "count"})

fig = px.imshow(
    df_plot.pivot(index="segment", columns="region", values="count").fillna(0),
    labels=dict(x="Region", y="Segment", color="Count"),
    x=df_plot["region"].unique(),
    y=df_plot["segment"].unique(),
    color_continuous_scale="Blues"
)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=False)

import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.subheader("Sales by Region")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["region"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_region = st.selectbox("Region", options)

if selected_region == "All":
    df_widget = df
    chart = px.box(
        df_widget,
        x="region",
        y="sales",
        template="simple_white"
    )

    df_widget = df[df["region"] == selected_region]
    chart = px.box(
        df_widget,
        y="sales",
        template="simple_white"
    )

chart.update_layout(height=500)

st.plotly_chart(chart, use_container_width=True)

segment: category
product: category
region: category
month: category
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.header("Count of Segment vs Product")

df_filtered = df[df["product"] == "B"]

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["region"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_region = st.selectbox("Region", options)
if selected_region == "All":
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered
else:
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered[df_filtered["region"] == selected_region]

df_plot = df_filtered_widget.groupby(["segment", "product"]).size().reset_index(name="count")

plot_fig = px.imshow(
    df_plot.pivot(index="product", columns="segment", values="count").fillna(0),
    labels=dict(x="Segment", y="Product", color="Count"),
    x=df_plot["segment"].unique(),
    y=df_plot["product"].unique(),
    color_continuous_scale="Blues"
)

st.plotly_chart(plot_fig, use_container_width=False)

)

import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.subheader("Sum Customer Age over Month")

df_plot = df.groupby("month", as_index=False, observed=True)["customer_age"].sum()

month_order = ['January', 'February', 'March', 'April', 'May', 'June', 
               'July', 'August', 'September', 'October', 'November', 'December']
month_order_short = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun', 
                     'Jul', 'Aug', 'Sep', 'Oct', 'Nov', 'Dec']

if df_plot['month'].dtype.name == 'category':
    df_plot['month'] = df_plot['month'].astype(str)

for order in [month_order, month_order_short, list(range(1, 13))]:
    if set(df_plot['month'].unique()).issubset(set(map(str, order))):
        df_plot['month'] = pd.Categorical(df_plot['month'], categories=[str(m) for m in order if str(m) in df_plot['month'].values], ordered=True)
        df_plot = df_plot.sort_values('month')
        break

plot_fig = px.line(
    df_plot,
    x="month",
    y="customer_age",
    template="simple_white"
)

plot_fig.update_layout(height=500)

st.plotly_chart(plot_fig, use_container_width=True)

import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.header("Mean Sales over Month")

df_plot = df.groupby("month", as_index=False)["sales"].mean()

month_order = ["January", "February", "March", "April", "May", "June", 
               "July", "August", "September", "October", "November", "December"]
month_order_short = ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun", 
                     "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec"]

if df_plot["month"].iloc[0] in month_order:
    df_plot["month"] = pd.Categorical(df_plot["month"], categories=month_order, ordered=True)
    df_plot = df_plot.sort_values("month")
elif df_plot["month"].iloc[0] in month_order_short:
    df_plot["month"] = pd.Categorical(df_plot["month"], categories=month_order_short, ordered=True)
    df_plot = df_plot.sort_values("month")

fig = px.line(
    df_plot,
    x="month",
    y="sales",
    markers=True
)

fig.update_layout(height=500)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=True)

product: category
segment: category
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.subheader("Count of Product vs Segment")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["segment"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_segment = st.selectbox("Segment", options)
if selected_segment == "All":
    df_widget = df
else:
    df_widget = df[df["segment"] == selected_segment]

df_plot = df_widget.groupby(["product", "segment"]).size().reset_index(name="count")

chart = px.density_heatmap(
    df_plot,
    x="product",
    y="segment",
    z="count",
    histfunc="sum",
    template="plotly"
)

st.plotly_chart(chart, use_container_width=False)

st.header("Distribution of Sales")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["region"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_region = st.selectbox("Region", options)
if selected_region == "All":
    df_widget = df
else:

fig = px.histogram(
    df_widget,
    x="sales",

)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=True)

profit: float

revenue: float
product: category
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.subheader("Count of Segment vs Product")

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["product"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_product = st.selectbox("Product", options)

if selected_product == "All":
    df_filtered = df
else:
    df_filtered = df[df["product"] == selected_product]

df_plot = df_filtered.groupby(["segment", "product"], observed=True).size().reset_index(name="count")

plot_fig = px.density_heatmap(
    df_plot,
    x="segment",
    y="product",
    z="count",
    template="plotly"
)

st.plotly_chart(plot_fig, use_container_width=False)

)

)

product: category
segment: category
year: int
revenue: float
month: category
output:
import streamlit as st
import plotly.express as px

st.header("Count of Segment vs Product")

df_filtered = df[df["year"] == 2024]

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["product"].dropna().unique().tolist())
selected_product = st.selectbox("Product", options)
if selected_product == "All":
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered
else:
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered[df_filtered["product"] == selected_product]

df_plot = df_filtered_widget.groupby(["segment", "product"]).size().reset_index(name="count")

fig = px.imshow(
    df_plot.pivot(index="product", columns="segment", values="count").fillna(0),
    labels=dict(x="Segment", y="Product", color="Count"),
    x=df_plot["segment"].unique(),
    y=df_plot["product"].unique(),
    color_continuous_scale="Blues",
    template="plotly_white"
)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=True)

selected_segment = st.selectbox("Segment", options)
if selected_segment == "All":
    df_widget = df

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["segment"].dropna().unique().tolist())

    df_widget = df

month_order = ["January", "February", "March", "April", "May", "June", 
               "July", "August", "September", "October", "November", "December"]
df_plot["month"] = pd.Categorical(df_plot["month"], categories=month_order, ordered=True)
df_plot = df_plot.sort_values("month")

plot_fig = px.line(
    df_plot,
    x="month",
    y="units",
    markers=True
)

st.plotly_chart(plot_fig, use_container_width=True)

    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered
else:
    df_filtered_widget = df_filtered[df_filtered["region"] == selected_region]

df_plot = df_filtered_widget.groupby(["region", "product"]).size().reset_index(name="count")

fig = px.imshow(
    df_plot.pivot(index="product", columns="region", values="count").fillna(0),
    labels=dict(x="Region", y="Product", color="Count"),
    x=df_plot["region"].unique(),
    y=df_plot["product"].unique(),
    template="plotly_white",
    color_continuous_scale="Blues"
)

st.plotly_chart(fig, use_container_width=False)

options = ["All"] + sorted(df["segment"].dropna().unique().tolist())

    y=df_plot["segment"].unique(),
    color_continuous_scale="Blues",
    template="simple_white"
)
